{{Quote|Your training with me is finished. Now your training in the greater galaxy begins.|Ortraag, to Shalavaa|<ref name="Galaxy" />}}
The [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] '''Ortraag''' lived approximately [[4000 BBY/Legends|four thousand]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. He [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] and promoted [[Shalavaa]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] male, to the rank of [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Jedi Protector]], and charged him with protecting a [[Unidentified fenti bean colony|fenti bean colony]]. Ortraag returned to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Time/Legends|time]] to witness Shalavaa fight a local [[Unidentified carnivorous plant (fenti bean colony)|carnivorous plant]].

==Biography==
Ortraag was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who trained as a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] around the period of the [[Old Sith Wars]], circa [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]. He eventually obtained the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and undertook the task of [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] the [[Human/Legends|Human]] male [[Shalavaa]]. Once Ortraag felt that Shalavaa had completed his training, he promoted the Human to the level of [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Jedi Protector]], and the pair traveled in an [[Ortraag's starship|ancient starship]] to a [[Unidentified fenti bean colony|colony]] of [[fenti bean]] [[Farm/Legends|farmers]]. There, Ortraag charged his student with protecting the colonists and maintaining peace before leaving the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="Galaxy" />

{{RPG}}
After several [[Time/Legends|weeks]], Ortraag returned to the planet to find Shalavaa investigating a ravine that the colonists believed to be haunted. Witnessing Shalavaa successfully [[Death/Legends|kill]] a vicious [[Unidentified carnivorous plant (fenti bean colony)|carnivorous plant]], Ortraag congratulated his former apprentice, telling him that he was ready to face greater challenges offworld.<ref name="Galaxy" />
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
Ortraag was able to instruct his apprentice on how to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to sharpen his senses of hearing and sight.

==Equipment==
The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master carried a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], the traditional weapon of the Jedi. He wore a dark [[Cloak/Legends|cloak]] and a [[Utility belt/Legends|belt]] to which he clipped his weapon.<ref name="Galaxy" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] created Ortraag for the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|roleplaying game]] adventure ''[[Jedi Protector]]'' published in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 13|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 13]] in [[1997]]. The story presented three outcomes to Shalavaa's encounter with the [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]], each depending on the results of several dice rolls. The above scenario reflects the two successful and probable outcomes. The least probable scenario has Ortraag intervening and killing the plant with his own lightsaber, finally deciding that his student is not competent enough to work on his own.<ref name="Galaxy" />

==Appearances==
